prompt: Verify the Muster Artifact Studio capability pack baseline contract.
recordedResponseText:
artifact-studio capability pack baseline.
Implemented tools: markdown_report, rows_to_csv, dashboard_manifest, docx_document, xlsx_workbook, pptx_presentation, pdf_document, artifact_capability_plan.
Status: deterministic artifact builders return strings, JSON, or base64 file payloads for the caller to save; higher-fidelity Codex/Claude app-server handoffs are only advertised when the host exposes those skills.
Safety: secret redaction is required and no raw credentials should be printed.
